title: Abbott India Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Abbott India Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Abbott India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Abbott India Holdings Services:
Abbott India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India Holdings Services!
